data.description:
# S2 — Deploy Gerrit + rebar MCP (docker-compose) behind nginx + TLS

## Why
Run Gerrit and the rebar MCP as the two containers on the box, reachable over HTTPS at
`rebar.solutions.navateam.com`. Gerrit needs a `%2F`-safe reverse proxy — the community
uses nginx/Apache, NOT Caddy (Caddy URL-decodes paths by default with no global switch,
which breaks Gerrit's change/project screens; no confirmed Caddy+Gerrit recipe exists).

## What
- `infra/compose/docker-compose.yml`:
  - official `gerritcodereview/gerrit` (pinned tag, 3.13/3.14) with persistent volumes
    (git/index/cache/etc/db on the data volume) + the two-step init.
  - the `rebar-mcp` container (`REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM=1`, signing key + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
    from the boot `.env`, write-gating as needed); both `restart: unless-stopped`, pinned tags.
- `gerrit.config`: `container.heapLimit=2g` with `core.packedGitLimit` budgeted INSIDE the
  heap (~512m-1g), NoteDb, `canonicalWebUrl=https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/`, sshd/httpd
  thread caps + `sshd.batchThreads` to avoid parallel-clone OOM.
- nginx + certbot (Let's Encrypt) terminating TLS on 443: route Gerrit (`%2F`-safe:
  `proxy_pass` with no path) and the MCP webhook/vote endpoint behind the one cert; Gerrit
  SSH passthrough on 29418.

## Scope
In: containers, volumes, base `gerrit.config`, nginx+TLS, MCP hosting. Out: Gerrit
project/label/submit-req (S3), bot identity + event wiring (S4), replication (S5).

## Files
- `infra/compose/docker-compose.yml`, `infra/compose/gerrit.config`, `infra/nginx/*.conf`,
  bootstrap scripts under `infra/`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Gerrit reachable at `https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/` with a valid Let's Encrypt cert;
      a change screen / a project path containing `%2F` renders correctly (encoded-slash round-trip verified).
- [ ] Gerrit SSH clone works on 29418; the admin account is bootstrapped; data persists across
      `docker compose down/up` and an instance reboot (`restart: unless-stopped`).
- [ ] The rebar MCP container runs co-located and is reachable through nginx, with its signing key
      + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY sourced from SSM (never baked into the image/compose).
- [ ] Gerrit runs a supported version (3.13/3.14) at a pinned tag; `heapLimit=2g` with
      `packedGitLimit` budgeted within it.
data.title: infra: S2 — Deploy Gerrit + rebar MCP (docker-compose) behind nginx + TLS
